channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Run an IT helpdesk agent with its own inbox
item.description: Internal IT email is mostly two things: password resets and "VPN won't connect." A help@ alias fills up with the same handful of requests, a human triages them by hand, copies the gist into a...

item.title: Filtered Vector Search: Where Every Benchmark Quietly Lies to You
item.description: Let me show you a magic trick every vector database benchmark performs. Step one: run a query with no filter. Just "find me the nearest neighbors to this vector." Step two: report the gorgeous QPS...

item.title: Yeah, I Started with Go
item.description: Hi guys, this is my first post, and this is the first ever post or blog that I am writing, so if there's any mistakes that I'm making while writing please try to bear with it. I started my coding...

item.title: Best AI Coding Tools in 2026: Full Power Rankings
item.description: AI coding tools have changed a lot in 2026. A year ago, GitHub Copilot was the obvious choice. Now you have 7+ serious options — and the right one depends on how you work. This article covers the...

item.title: Stop Your LLM From Getting Owned
item.description: Hello, I'm Maneshwar. I'm building git-lrc, a Micro AI code reviewer that runs on every commit. It is free and source-available on Github. Star git-lrc to help devs discover the project. Do give...

item.title: A free llms.txt validator
item.description: turva.dev now has a free llms.txt validator at https://turva.dev/llms-txt-validator. Enter a domain and it fetches that site's /llms.txt, checks the structure against the format and reports each...

item.title: Microsoft's 99 AI Skills Are Interesting. The Bigger Story Is What They Represent.
item.description: AI coding assistants already understand .NET. The next challenge is teaching them how your team builds software. One of the most interesting things happening in software engineering right now...

item.title: Compare version numbers
item.description: Problem Statement Given two version strings: version1 version2 Each version consists of revisions separated by dots (.). Compare the two versions. Return: 1 → version1 > version2 -1 → version1 <...

item.title: 🚀 Introducing Prism Guard — An Open Source Frontend Architecture Intelligence Platform

item.title: compound engineering is the only AI coding idea that actually compounds
item.description: I've been building software with AI agents every day for months. The biggest thing I've learned has nothing to do with which model or which tool is hot this week. Its this: most people's AI output...

item.title: The video game disc is dead
item.description: For decades, to be a gamer was to accumulate a lot of stuff. Consoles, controllers, accessories, weird VR gloves that never worked properly, but mostly the games themselves. Over the years, games...

item.title: Influencer screenings aren’t going away

item.title: Achieving operational excellence with AI
item.description: Frameworks like Lean Six Sigma and business process management (BPM) first gained traction because they promised clarity in the chaos—a structured way to bring order to messy, sprawling...

item.title: ThreatsDay: AI Compute Hijacking, Apple Email Flaw, BlueHammer Ransomware + 14 Stories
item.description: This week’s security news is mostly about weak spots. Browsers, bots, sandboxes, AI systems, and email flows all show the same problem in different ways. Everything looks normal until someone...

item.title: OpenAI proposed donating 5% of its equity to a US sovereign wealth fund
item.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has reportedly proposed giving 5% of the company’s equity to a U.S. sovereign wealth fund, reviving discussions about letting the public share in the financial gains from the...

item.title: Godox’s feature-packed key light is down to its best price yet
item.description: If you don’t want to spend $180 on the Elgato Key Light, the Godox ES45 Desktop LED Key Light is a more affordable option that offers nearly as much brightness and plenty of features, including...

item.title: Tesla’s Q2 sales jump 25 percent
item.description: Tesla just released its second-quarter delivery and production report, showing that the automaker is starting to recover after a particularly brutal sales year in 2025. The company said that it...

item.title: Microsoft launches its own AI deployment company with $2.5 billion commitment
item.description: Microsoft follows Amazon, OpenAI, and Anthropic with its new AI deployment group.

item.title: ToddyCat-Linked Umbrij Malware Abuses OAuth to Access Gmail via Google API
item.description: The threat actor known as ToddyCat has been attributed to a new malware called Umbrij that's designed to gain surreptitious access to a victim's email correspondence via the Google API. "In this...

item.title: Teaching AI to run with the turbines
item.description: Artificial intelligence may have captured the public imagination through chatbots and image generators, but some of its most consequential use cases are unfolding far from consumer-facing tools....

item.title: The Download: a startup has a solution for AI’s groupthink problem
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. LLMs are stuck in a groupthink groove. This startup is...

item.title: Yep, we’re using OpenClaw to date now
item.description: Ben Guez has "a bunch of potential international wives in [his] DMs," thanks to an automated script he set up using OpenClaw, Claude code, and Instagram trials.

item.title: Mystery box shows are complicated for everyone — even the actors

item.title: Identity Lifecycle Management Wasn't Built for AI Agents
item.description: Identity lifecycle management was architected around a person with an employment record, a manager, and a departure date. AI agents have none of those. As autonomous principals proliferate across...

item.title: Cybersecurity Mission Creep in the US

item.title: BitTorrent’s disastrous, legendary, and controversial story

item.title: OpenAI floats giving Trump administration 5 percent cut of AI boom
item.description: OpenAI has floated giving the US government a 5 percent ownership stake as a way of easing tensions with the Trump administration and blunting mounting public backlash against AI, according to the...

item.title: Meta Is Charging a Subscription for Smart Glasses Features. Welcome to the New Era of Consumer Tech
item.description: You bought the hardware. Now you’ll need to subscribe for “expanded access” to the most advanced features.

item.title: Amazon has enough satellites to launch its Starlink competitor
item.description: Amazon says it now has enough satellites operating in low-Earth orbit to light up its Starlink internet competitor. With last night's launch, Amazon Leo has 396 satellites deployed, which is...
